results.rendered_html:
parisaṃkhyāna (wie eben) n.
1〉 = parisaṃkhyā 1: bhūtānāṃ parisaṃkhyānaṃ bhūyaḥ putra niśāmaya  MBH. 12,9131 . tattvānām  BHĀG. P. 2,8,19 . sāṃkhyajñānaṃ pravakṣyāmi parisaṃkhyānadarśanam  MBH. 12,11393  (vgl.  HALL  in der Einl. zu  SĀṂKHYAPR. 2 ). puruṣāyuṣāhorātra˚ adj.  BHĀG. P. 5,18,15 .
— 2〉 richtige Beurtheilung: śarīra˚  YĀJÑ. 3,158 .
— 3〉 = parisaṃkhyā 2〉. Schol. zu  KĀTY. ŚR. 618,6 .  Z. d. d. m. G. IX. LXXI.
